responseMessageContents.text:
Phase 4.0 is complete. Here's the summary:

---

## Files Changed

**Root app files modified/verified:**
- `app/+not-found.tsx` — Branded with Heavyar styling (Arabic + English)
- `components/EquipmentCard.tsx` — Fixed city resolution to use full `saudiRegions` data instead of limited `mockCities`

**Expo mirror files synced:**
- `expo/app/+not-found.tsx`, `expo/components/EquipmentCard.tsx`, `expo/types/index.ts`, `expo/mocks/saudiRegions.ts` (new), `expo/services/otpService.ts` (new), `expo/services/authService.ts`, `expo/services/firestoreService.ts`, `expo/contexts/AuthContext.tsx`, `expo/i18n/translations.ts`, `expo/app/register.tsx`, `expo/app/login.tsx`, `expo/app/edit-equipment.tsx`, `expo/app/(tabs)/add/index.tsx`, `expo/app/(tabs)/profile/index.tsx`, `expo/app/(tabs)/search/index.tsx`

**Worker (already in code from prior session):**
- `worker/src/index.ts` — Contains `POST /api/send-email-otp` and `POST /api/verify-email-otp`

---

## How OTP Works
1. User enters email → frontend calls `POST /api/send-email-otp` on the Cloudflare Worker
2. Worker generates 6-digit OTP, stores it in memory (10-min expiry), sends via Resend API
3. User enters code → frontend calls `POST /api/verify-email-otp`
4. Worker validates code → returns `verified: true` or error code (`OTP_EXPIRED`, `OTP_INVALID`, `OTP_NOT_FOUND`)
5. Registration cannot proceed unless email is verified

## Worker Endpoints Added (prior session)
- `POST /api/send-email-otp` — Generates and emails OTP via Resend
- `POST /api/verify-email-otp` — Validates OTP server-side

## Region/City Structure
- `mocks/saudiRegions.ts`: All 13 official Saudi administrative regions with cities
- Eastern Region has 16 cities (Dammam, Khobar, Dhahran, Jubail, Al Ahsa, Hofuf, Mubarraz, Hafar Al Batin, Ras Tanura, Saihat, Qatif, Nairyah, Khafji, Abqaiq, Tarout, Safwa)
- Data model: `region` (ID), `city` (ID), `customCity` (optional fallback text)
- City selector is searchable, with manual fallback input

## Custom City Fallback
- Used in registration, profile edit, create listing, and edit listing forms
- If city not found in list, user types custom name → stored in `customCity` field
- `EquipmentCard` now resolves city from full `saudiRegions` data, falls back to `customCity`

## Splash/Welcome Text
- `app.json`: name = "Heavyar"
- Login screen: Shows `t('app_name')` ("هيفيار" / "Heavyar") + `t('heavyar_tagline')` ("منصة تأجير المعدات الثقيلة")
- Onboarding: Uses localized branded text
- Not-found page: Now branded with Arabic + English Heavyar text
- No "Expo RN Cross-Platform" or framework placeholder text remains

## Home Feed
- No fix required. `fetchEquipmentList()` queries `equipment` collection with `isActive == true` and has fallback for missing index. Logging is in place.
- Fixed `EquipmentCard` to properly resolve all cities (was previously limited to 8 mock cities)

## Secrets
- `RESEND_API_KEY` — backend-only (Worker secret), never in frontend
- `TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST` — backend-only (Worker secret), never in frontend
- No secrets in Firestore, frontend code, or GitHub

## ⚠️ Worker Deployment Note
The Cloudflare API token from the previous session has **expired**. The OTP endpoints exist in `worker/src/index.ts` but the worker currently serves the older version without them. **You need to provide a fresh Cloudflare API token** to redeploy the worker, or redeploy manually via the Cloudflare dashboard.

responseMessageContents.title: Added email security codes, Saudi city lists, and updated app branding.
responseMessageContents.description: This update improves security by sending a verification code to your email during sign-up. We have also added a list of all Saudi regions and cities to make it easier to set your location, with an option to type your city if it is not on the list. The app now features our official name and descriptions in both Arabic and English on the welcome screens. Additionally, we fixed the display of location details for equipment listings on the main page.
